description: Absolutely stylish, comfortable and different, the puma 917 Lo Funpack shoes are great for urban wear. Inspired by the German reggae, dance hall and culture magazine - Riddim - these shoes look great when teamed with jeans and tees.UpperCanvas upper with canvas Formstripe on the sides for protection, comfort and styleLace-ups for a snug, customised FitExtra pair of laces provided for a different lookBrand logo embroidered behind the collar for styleRubber toe-guard for better protectionMidsolePadded fabric lined footbed for all-day comfortRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with check pattern grooves for ultimate grip and tractionFlex grooves for better flexibility of the feet
